reason: Core gate mechanics (tsc, tests, ratchet, eslint-disable allowlist, scope) still valid, but framed in retired multi-mode/6-gate Sentinelle model contradicting UFR-022 mode-unique 5-phase pipeline.

staleClaims.actual: UFR-022 pipeline = 9 phases (spec/plan/doc-freshness/red/green/verify/security/review/documenter); no fixed '6 portes Sentinelle'. SKILL.md:95.

staleClaims.claim: Mode backend-only -> pas de modifs dans museum-frontend/
staleClaims.actual: Mode selector (backend-only/frontend-only) retired; scope is informatif only, no pipeline branching. SKILL.md:91,95.
micro/standard/enterprise pipeline selector retired UFR-022; pipeline is unique. SKILL.md:99.

staleClaims.claim: Si tsc_errors>0 OU ratchet_regressions -> forcer mode 'bug'
staleClaims.actual: mode 'bug' (and chore/hotfix/audit/mockup) retired UFR-022; no force-bug branching exists. SKILL.md:95.

staleClaims.claim: Chaque agent DEV doit, AVANT de rendre son travail (self-verification)
staleClaims.actual: Partially stale: agents are now fresh-context spec/plan/red/green/review spawns; lint/tsc/test delegated to team-hooks/, not manual self-verification. SKILL.md:31.
Verified: import-coherence.md exists in team-protocols/. Reference valid.
